$meta.purpose: Specify font families, typographic sizes, weights, and rules for headers/labels

sans.purpose: Default typography for UI controls, navigation labels, paragraphs, buttons, and sidebar items.

mono.purpose: Use for keyboard shortcuts (<kbd>), audit logs, dynamic key/token strings, and monospace code blocks.

scale.usage: Extremely small metadata controls (e.g. keyboard triggers inside <kbd>).
Group section titles (e.g. sidebar categories, small badges). Typically combined with font-bold, uppercase, and tracking-wider.
Standard UI density text. Used for sidebar nav lists, body copy inside support grids, header options, and input values.
Default text sizes for action buttons, select dropdown trigger texts, list headers, and medium titles.
Main body headers, smaller panel titles, or subheadings.
Medium section titles (e.g. Browse by Topic category header).
Main screen headers and dashboard tab titles.
Support Portal homepage main title headings.

rules.rule: Always pair font-bold or font-semibold with tracking-tight on headers (text-sm and above) to maintain the signature neat, modern corporate look.
rules.evidence: Headers inside SupportGrid, BrowseByTopic, and layout page use classes like 'text-xl font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground'.

rules.rule: Pair text-xs descriptions with text-muted-foreground for secondary labels or supporting explanatory text.
rules.evidence: Observed on sub-headings, footer copyrights, case details, and support grid card cards.
